message:
fix(fwc): fix faceted search with empty query and migrate MCP tests to async-core

search: add has_active_filters() to SearchFilters, fix faceted-only
search so empty-query-with-filters returns results. Update test fixtures
to use MetadataField::Unknown. Add punctuation_only_query test.

readiness: change default approval_mode from "none" to "" (empty string)
to avoid fabricating data.

serve_mcp: replace tokio::spawn with fcp_async_core::task::spawn and
#[tokio::test] with #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test] in 4 MCP transport
tests, completing the runtime abstraction migration.

bench_helpers: update fixtures for MetadataField::Unknown consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
